chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1764 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.7118/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 20.11.2025 Mr. Shanker Lal Meghwar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along-with Inspector Asad Parhiyar SHO Odero Lal Station and SIP Abdul Ghafoor PS Odero Lal. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. == Learned counsel for the petitioner, under the instructions, does not press this petition. Accordingly, present petition stands dismissed as not pressed together with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
